zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Ufford I於1298年8月9日出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可瑟斯頓時，他的父親Robert de Ufford II19歲，母親Cecily de Valoignes17歲。他於1327年11月13日與Margaret Norwich在英國英格蘭素福爾可結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1337年登記服兵役。他去世於1369年11月4日在英國英格蘭素福爾可帕哈姆享年71歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可坎普 艾什。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Ufford I于1298年8月9日出生在英国英格兰素福爾可瑟斯頓时，他的父亲Robert de Ufford II19岁，母亲Cecily de Valoignes17岁。他于1327年11月13日与Margaret Norwich在英国英格兰素福爾可结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1337年登记服兵役。他去世于1369年11月4日在英国英格兰素福爾可帕哈姆享年71岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可坎普 艾什。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ufford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Ufford (Northamptonshire), Ufford (Suffolk), or Offord Cluny or Offord Darcy (Huntingdonshire). The Northamptonshire and Suffolk placenames derive from the Old English personal name Uffa + Old English worth ‘enclosure’. For the Huntingdonshire placename see Offord , with which the surname may have been confused.

variants.name: Offord
meanings: English (East Anglia and London): habitational name from Offord Cluny and Offord Darcy in Huntindgonshire. The placename derives from Old English upp ‘up, upper’ + ford ‘ford’.
English: alternatively, from a lost place called Offord near Pennyford in Wootton Wawen, Warwickshire. The placename derives from the Old English personal name Offa + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Ufford I was born on 9 August 1298, in Thurston, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert de Ufford II, was 19 and his mother, Cecily de Valoignes, was 17. He married Margaret Norwich on 13 November 1327, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. He registered for military service in 1337. He died on 4 November 1369, in Parham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71, and was buried in Campsey Ash, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Ufford I est né le 9 août 1298, à Thurston, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Ufford II, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Cecily de Valoignes, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Norwich le 13 novembre 1327, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1337. Il est décédé le 4 novembre 1369, à Parham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Campsey Ash, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Ufford I am 9. August 1298 in Thurston, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Ufford II 19 und seine Mutter Cecily de Valoignes 17. Er hat am 13. November 1327 in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Margaret Norwich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er hat sich 1337 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 4. November 1369 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Parham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Campsey Ash, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Ufford I è nato il il 9 agosto 1298 nel Thurston, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert de Ufford II, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Cecily de Valoignes, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Norwich il 13 novembre 1327, nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1337. Morì il 4 novembre 1369, nel Parham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Campsey Ash, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Ufford Iが1298年8月9日にイギリスイギリススフォルクスウルストンで生まれた時，父Robert de Ufford IIは19歳，母Cecily de Valoignesは17歳であった。1327年11月13日にイギリスイギリススフォルクでMargaret Norwichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1337年に兵役登録をした。彼は1369年11月4日にイギリスイギリススフォルクパーハムで71歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクカンプセイ アッシュにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Ufford I(이)가 1298년 8월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스르스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Ufford II(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily de Valoignes(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1327년 11월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 Margaret Norwich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1337년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1369년 11월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 파람에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 캠프시 애시에 묻혔다.

pt.9 August 1298–4 November 1369: 9 de agosto de 1298–4 de novembro de 1369
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Ufford I nasceu em 9 de agosto de 1298, em Thurston, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Ufford II, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Cecily de Valoignes, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Norwich em 13 de novembro de 1327, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1337. Ele faleceu em 4 de novembro de 1369, em Parham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Campsey Ash, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Ufford I родился 9 августа 1298 г. в местности турстон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert de Ufford II было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily de Valoignes, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Norwich 13 ноября 1327 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. В 1337 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 4 ноября 1369 г. в местности парам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности кампси аш, суффолк, Англия.

es.9 August 1298–4 November 1369: 9 de agosto de 1298–4 de noviembre de 1369
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Ufford I nació el 9 de agosto de 1298, en Thurston, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert de Ufford II, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Cecily de Valoignes, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Margaret Norwich el 13 de noviembre de 1327, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1337. Murió el 4 de noviembre de 1369, en Parham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Campsey Ash, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
